translated: I don't think I have anything left to say, but...
Well, I've really put everything
into Ena's voice, so I'm rooting for her.
More than anything, I hope you can feel Ena's way of life through the song and the story.
Please continue to support Ena,
everyone.
To those who already support her, thank you so much.
I'm not Ena herself,
but as the person
who voices her,
I like to think of myself as someone close to her. Now that she's made this resolution, I'll work hard every day to express her growth as an actress.
So please, keep an eye on Ena.
Thank you.
It's been a short time, but that's all for this edition of
ProSeka AfterTalk: Colors of Pure Sense.
To everyone watching the stream, how was it?
If you haven't finished the story for the Colors of Pure Sense event yet,
did I look a bit silly crying like that?
Once the next event starts, you can read the entire event story from the archives,
so please check it out.
AfterTalk is always looking for your messages.
You can submit them via the AfterTalk channel on the official ProSeka Discord or by email.
Please send some in when the next AfterTalk event is held.
Please make sure your messages are related to the event.
It would be a waste if you wrote about something else and it didn't get featured.
Right.
So, in about ten or
twenty seconds,
the
2DMV will be available, so let's watch it together.
I'll be watching it once I close this screen,
so you guys should check it out too.
Until next time, everyone.
Goodbye!
Still that...
Yes.
